title: Britain foils High North Russian operation in month-long submarine hunt
summary_full: “Putin would have wanted us distracted by the situation in the Middle East. My point today is to demonstrate publicly that we are not," John Healey said
summary_public: “Putin would have wanted us distracted by the situation in the Middle East. My point today is to demonstrate publicly that we are not," John Healey said
